ui_features.cursor: Apply a global custom cursor using an inline SVG of a pen in index.css. Example: cursor: url('data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="%23028090" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M17 3a2.828 2.828 0 1 1 4 4L7.5 20.5 2 22l1.5-5.5L17 3z"></path></svg>') 0 24, auto;
ui_features.bookmark_tabs: Navigation links should visually resemble bookmarks on hover/active states. Use CSS clip-path on an absolute pseudo-element: clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 50% 80%, 0 100%).
ui_features.smooth_scrolling: Use lenis library for premium momentum scrolling.
ui_features.whatsapp_button: Fixed floating action button in the bottom-right corner using the teal accent color.

hero.animation: Subtle Book Opening Animation: Overlay two solid primary-color motion.div elements (w-1/2 each). The left one rotates left (transformOrigin: 'left', rotateY: -90), the right one rotates right (transformOrigin: 'right', rotateY: 90) on mount using framer-motion, revealing the hero content.
hero.layout: High-impact hero section with a gradient text or solid typography for 'Shaping Futures Since 1997'. Background image should be visible with a bg-white/80 or gradient overlay to ensure text contrast.

components.about_us: Asymmetric split layout. Left: High-quality image of the mentor with a teal accent border. Right: Staggered typography telling the story of Bright Vision Infotech.
components.why_choose_us: Bento Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 or md:grid-cols-12). Highlight experience, trustworthiness, and academic excellence with clean icons (lucide-react).
components.courses_offered: Grid Borders style. Avoid generic cards; use a grid with 1px border-r and border-b. Content should cover Classes 9-12, NEET, JEE, and Certifications.
components.mode_of_learning: Minimalist comparison (Online vs Offline) using generous spacing and subtle background color differences (white vs surface).
components.testimonials: Editorial Ribbon style. Use 'react-fast-marquee' for a slow, continuous scroll of student reviews.
components.contact: Clean, highly structured form using Shadcn components. No heavy shadows, just 1px borders. Include WhatsApp contact info alongside.
components.footer: High-contrast dark footer using primary color (#0B2545) with white text. Minimal and professional.

about_us_mentor.description: Experienced mentor pointing at a notebook

courses_books.description: Stack of books for courses visual

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST read this entire file carefully before coding.
Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lenis, lucide-react, react-fast-marquee, @radix-ui/react-slot, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Implement the 'Book Opening' hero animation precisely as described in the components section using Framer Motion.
Apply the custom pen cursor globally in your CSS.
Implement the bookmark navigation tabs with CSS clip-path or absolute positioned shapes.
Ensure all fonts are imported correctly (Outfit for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body).
Do NOT use heavy shadows or glowing/magical effects. Keep it subtle, academic, and professional.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Implement the floating WhatsApp chat button.
